title: Luscious American Beef Casserole
description: A malty, flaky, festive American dish featuring savory beef gravy and a crisp breadcrumb topping, with a subtle flexitarian-friendly twist.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat.
Add cubed beef to the skillet and sear until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
In the same skillet, add diced onion and the sliced mixed carrots/celery; cook until softened, about 4 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for 30 seconds.
Return beef to the skillet, add tomato paste, Worcestershire sauce, soy sauce, and beef broth; stir to combine.
Bring mixture to a simmer, cover, and let simmer for 15 minutes.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish; spread evenly.
In a bowl, combine melted butter, breadcrumbs, and Parmesan cheese; sprinkle mixture over casserole.
Bake uncovered for 25 minutes, until the topping is golden and the casserole is heated through.
